About Us
Request a Quote
Careers

The Cohere Centre is built on a team that takes genuine pride in putting on great events. We look for people who bring that same energy, whether their background is in hospitality, event production, food service, facility operations, or safety and security.

What We Look For

Every role at the Cohere Centre contributes directly to the experience of thousands of attendees, exhibitors, and clients each year. We value people who are service-oriented, adaptable, and take ownership of their work. Specific backgrounds we are regularly interested in include:

Hospitality and guest services

Event coordination and production

Culinary and food and beverage service

Facility and building operations

Electrical, rigging, and technical services

Safety, security, and first aid

Sales and client services

There are no specific positions posted at this time. We are always interested in hearing from strong candidates and encourage general interest applications. If a role that fits your background becomes available, we will be in touch.

Eastern Ontario’s Largest Exhibition Centre serving one of the most diverse client bases of any facility in the region.
